title: ActiveCampaign vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign vs Flodesk. Find which email marketing tool fits your business with pricing, features, and ratings.
h1: ActiveCampaign vs Flodesk: Complete Comparison Guide
intro: ActiveCampaign and Flodesk are both powerful email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels at automation and CRM functionality for complex sales workflows, while Flodesk prioritizes beautiful design and simplicity for creative professionals. Your choice depends on whether you need advanced business automation or stunning visual email campaigns.
choose_a_if: You need advanced automation, lead scoring, and CRM capabilities for B2B sales workflows
You want the lowest starting price and are willing to pay per contact
You require SMS marketing, site tracking, and dynamic content personalization
choose_b_if: You're a designer, photographer, or visual brand prioritizing beautiful email aesthetics
You want unlimited subscribers on a flat monthly rate with no contact-based fees
You need ecommerce features like checkout forms and link-in-bio functionality

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign excels at complex automation and CRM for enterprise teams, while Flodesk is superior for creative professionals who prioritize design. ActiveCampaign has higher ratings (4.5 on G2) due to its feature depth, but Flodesk earns top marks (4.8 on G2) for ease of use.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Flodesk?
faq.a: ActiveCampaign starts at $15/month, making it cheaper upfront, but costs scale with subscriber count. Flodesk's $38/month flat rate covers unlimited subscribers, making it better value if you have a large contact list. For small lists under 500 contacts, ActiveCampaign is typically more affordable.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, most email platforms allow contact and campaign exports. Both tools support standard email list formats, so migration is straightforward. However, you'll need to recreate ActiveCampaign's advanced automation workflows manually, as they don't import directly from simpler platforms like Flodesk.
